definitions: A hollow muscular organ that pumps the blood through the circulatory system.
The central or innermost part of something.
The essential or most important part of something.
One of the four suits in a deck of playing cards, represented by a red heart shape.
Emotional or moral nature as distinguished from the intellect.
examples: The doctor listened to her heart.
The heart of the city was bustling.
Get to the heart of the matter.
He drew the queen of hearts.
